abstract: Navigation architecture patterns covering responsive navbars, mobile bottom tabs, sidebars, command palettes, breadcrumbs, mega menus, and tab interfaces. Includes accessibility requirements (ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, focus management), mobile-first strategy (375px-4K), decision matrix for pattern selection (5 patterns, 6+ design system references), and code examples for top navbar, bottom tab bar, sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, and Cmd+K command palette. Synthesizes Material Design, Polaris, Carbon Design System, W3C ARIA practices.
